summary.summary: Update Config.xcconfig development version identifiers: commit 03dc8e86d84e2207f6eda4abb18976166475ca91 bumps APP_DEV_VERSION from 0.8.0.2 to 0.8.0.3 while APP_VERSION remains 0.8.0, and commit e2bc1cd2d4be32f8d86af1bf686860a273325691 bumps APP_DEV_VERSION from 0.8.1 to 0.8.1.1 while APP_VERSION is 0.8.1 (changes are in Config.xcconfig) (see commit:03dc8e86d84e2207f6eda4abb18976166475ca91, commit:e2bc1cd2d4be32f8d86af1bf686860a273325691, file:5692afcf1358, diff:6b407ea4d5cc, pr:nightscout/Trio#1212).
summary.userFacingImpact: No application behavior changes are evident in the supplied diff; the edits modify only the APP_DEV_VERSION build identifier(s) in Config.xcconfig, which appear to be CI/build metadata (see diff:6b407ea4d5cc and commits commit:03dc8e86d84e2207f6eda4abb18976166475ca91, commit:e2bc1cd2d4be32f8d86af1bf686860a273325691).
